heading: Omitted
label: 1541 Omitted
notes: CodificationSection, acts , title III, § 301, formerly § 4, ; renumbered title III, § 301, and amended , ; , , which provided that when President declared that emergency declared by him on , ceased to exist, the authority contained in sections 1521, 1532, 1561, and 1562 of this title terminate and that property acquired or constructed under subchapters II to VII of this subchapter be disposed of as promptly as advantageous under circumstances and in public interest, was omitted pursuant to , , as amended by , , which provided that this section continue in force until six months after the national emergency proclaimed by the President on by Proc.
